title: ehrharta ottonis
intro: Ehrharta ottonis, also known as Wallaby grass, is a perennial grass native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ehrharta ottonis include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting digestive health. Ehrharta ottonis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
